scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install --include=dev && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm install --include=dev && npm run build && rm -rf dist/public && mkdir -p dist/public && cp -r ../frontend/dist/. dist/public/
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm install --include=dev && npm run build
scripts.build:server: cd backend && npm install --include=dev && npm run build
